2604.13455.title: Outperforming Self-Attention Mechanisms in Solar Irradiance Forecasting via Physics-Guided Neural Networks
2604.13455.paper_summary: Accurate Global Horizontal Irradiance (GHI) forecasting is critical for grid stability, particularly in arid regions characterized by rapid aerosol fluctuations. While recent trends favor computationally expensive Transformer-based architectures, this paper challenges the prevailing "complexity-first" paradigm. We propose a lightweight, Physics-Informed Hybrid CNN-BiLSTM framework that prioritizes domain knowledge over architectural depth. The model integrates a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for spatial feature extraction with a Bi-Directional LSTM for capturing temporal dependencies. Unlike standard data-driven approaches, our model is explicitly guided by a vector of 15 engineered features including Clear-Sky indices and Solar Zenith Angle - rather than relying solely on raw historical data. Hyperparameters are rigorously tuned using Bayesian Optimization to ensure global optimality. Experimental validation using NASA POWER data in Sudan demonstrates that our physics-guided approach achieves a Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) of 19.53 W/m^2, significantly outperforming complex attention-based baselines (RMSE 30.64 W/m^2). These results confirm a "Complexity Paradox": in high-noise meteorological tasks, explicit physical constraints offer a more efficient and accurate alternative to self-attention mechanisms. The findings advocate for a shift towards hybrid, physics-aware AI for real-time renewable energy management.
2604.13455.paper_summary_zh: 準確的全球水平輻射 (GHI) 預測對於電網穩定性至關重要，特別是在特徵為快速氣溶膠波動的乾旱地區。雖然近期趨勢偏向計算成本高昂的基於Transformer的架構，但本文挑戰了現行的「複雜性優先」範式。我們提出了一個輕量級的物理知識驅動混合 CNN-BiLSTM 框架，優先考慮領域知識而非架構深度。該模型整合了卷積神經網絡 (CNN) 用於空間特徵提取，並使用雙向 LSTM 捕捉時間依賴性。與標準的數據驅動方法不同，我們的模型明確地受到15個工程特徵的指導，包括晴空指數和太陽天頂角，而不是僅僅依賴原始歷史數據。超參數經過嚴格調整，使用貝葉斯優化以確保全局最優性。使用 NASA POWER 數據在蘇丹進行的實驗驗證顯示，我們的物理引導方法達到了 19.53 W/m^2 的均方根誤差 (RMSE)，顯著優於複雜的基於注意力的基準 (RMSE 30.64 W/m^2)。這些結果確認了一個「複雜性悖論」：在高噪聲氣象任務中，明確的物理約束提供了一種比自注意力機制更高效且準確的替代方案。這些發現倡導向混合的、具有物理意識的人工智慧轉變，以實現即時可再生能源管理。
2604.13455.author: Mohammed Ezzaldin Babiker Abdullah et.al.
2604.13455.authors: Mohammed Ezzaldin Babiker Abdullah, Rufaidah Abdallah Ibrahim Mohammed
